channel.title: EBay-Tech-Blog on Daily Tech Articles Feed
channel.description: Recent content in EBay-Tech-Blog on Daily Tech Articles Feed

item.title: eBay Partners with Meta for New Affiliate Program, Boosting Social Commerce for Sellers and Creators
item.description: 📢 eBay has partnered with Meta to launch a new affiliate program, enhancing social commerce opportunities for sellers and creators. This initiative allows creators to embed eBay listings directly into their content on Facebook, making it easier for followers to discover products. This collaboration aims to boost sales for eBay sellers while providing creators with new revenue streams. #eBay #Meta #AffiliateMarketing #SocialCommerce #Creators

item.title: AI Trends to Watch In 2026
item.description: 🌐 Leaders at eBay have shared insights on transformative tech trends to watch in 2026. Key areas of focus include advancements in artificial intelligence, automation, and data analytics. These innovations are expected to reshape industries and enhance user experiences. Stay informed about these trends to understand their potential impact! #AITrends #TechInnovation #eBayInsights #FutureOfTech #2026Vision

item.title: Unwrap Innovation: How Sellers and Buyers Use AI to Brighten the Holidays
item.description: This holiday season, eBay is enhancing the shopping experience with advanced AI tools. Sellers can now list items more quickly, manage messages efficiently, and increase their product visibility. For buyers, the platform offers personalized discovery, trusted authentication, and a safer shopping environment. Explore the future of holiday shopping! 🎄🛍️✨ #eBay #AI #HolidayShopping #Innovation #eCommerce
